label: Manager Answer Consolidation
description: Builds a manager-friendly final answer from validated evidence, confidence status, and conflict flags.
inputs: intermediate JSON with count_analysis and generic_analysis
rationale: The consolidation pattern fits well and can be adapted from its current domain to merge enterprise document and KPI outputs into a final response.

explanation.purpose: Merge validated evidence, live KPI outputs, and any conflict or confidence signals into one manager-friendly summary.
explanation.role_in_workflow: Once the system knows what evidence is available and whether conflicts exist, this node composes the actual response text. It turns raw retrieval outputs and SQL results into a concise manager-facing answer that can include both perspectives, note any mismatch, and respect low-confidence fallback decisions.
explanation.why_it_exists: Managers asked for quick KPI summaries rather than analyst-style raw outputs, so a dedicated consolidation layer is needed to translate technical evidence into executive-friendly language. Adapting an existing answer consolidation pattern is more efficient than building a new summarizer, while still allowing customization for conflict-aware KPI responses.
consumes_from: validated evidence, conflict flags, confidence status
explanation.chat_relationship: This step addresses the user's requirement to give a manager-facing summary even when there is a conflict, rather than stopping the flow for review first.
explanation.execution_summary: Builds a manager-friendly final answer from validated evidence, confidence status, and conflict flags.
